messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Not sure which email my account is under

I have two work emails and I can't remember which one I used to register for Driftwood. Password reset isn't arriving on either. How can I find out?

response.content: {"category":"account_access","priority":"low","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":true,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about account access — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
